content.text:
Looking at the image, the track appears as a uniform green surface with no visible track boundaries or waypoints ahead — the car is off-track (is_offtrack=true) and severely misaligned.

**Waypoint Analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 79, target = 79 + 5 = 84
- Waypoint 84: x=6.0793, y=2.7734
- Car position: x=1.5392, y=5.0977
- Bearing = atan2(2.7734 - 5.0977, 6.0793 - 1.5392) = atan2(-2.3243, 4.5401)
- = atan2(-2.3243, 4.5401) ≈ -27.1°
- Current heading: 129.40°
- Delta = -27.1 - 129.40 = -156.5° → normalized: -156.5°

Still massively misaligned. Maximum right steering required.

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Car is confirmed off-track (is_offtrack=true) with heading 129° while target waypoint bearing is -27°, requiring maximum right steering at minimum speed to recover alignment.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Car has been off-track for many steps — is_offtrack=true confirmed at step 121",
    "Heading decreasing slowly: 169→152→144→137→133→129 — right turn working but very slow",
    "Must maintain maximum right steering (-25) at low speed (0.75) until heading reaches ~-27°",
    "Target heading is approximately -27° (east-southeast) to realign with track",
    "Car is far left of track center (is_left_of_center=false, distance=0.628 with width=0.762)",
    "Visual shows uniform green — car is off the track surface entirely",
    "Need heading to drop by ~156° more — will take many more steps at current rate",
    "Progress stalled at 66.77% — car not advancing along track while off-track",
    "Car position drifting slightly: x decreasing, y increasing — moving further from track",
    "Simulator may reset car if off-track persists — continue max right steer regardless"
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [1.602, 1.578, 1.578, 1.558, 1.539],
    "y": [4.957, 5.001, 5.001, 5.045, 5.098],
    "yaw": [139.971, 136.553, 136.553, 133.138, 129.400]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": -156.5,
  "speed": 0.75,
  "steering_angle": -25.0
}
```
